AffiliateDisclosure.title: Affiliate Disclosure
AffiliateDisclosure.metaDescription: Learn about our affiliate partnerships and how we maintain editorial independence while earning commissions.
AffiliateDisclosure.subtitle: Transparency in our partnerships and affiliate relationships
AffiliateDisclosure.introduction: This website participates in affiliate marketing programs, including but not limited to Amazon Associates, Disney Affiliate Program, and other streaming service affiliate networks.
AffiliateDisclosure.commissionDescription: This means that if you click on certain links on our site and make a purchase, we may receive a small commission at no extra cost to you. These commissions help us maintain and improve the website, create more content, and keep it free for everyone to use.
AffiliateDisclosure.editorialDescription: We only recommend services and products that we genuinely believe are valuable to our readers. Our reviews, comparisons, and recommendations are based on our own research, user feedback, and experience — not on financial incentives.
AffiliateDisclosure.transparencyDescription: We are completely transparent: affiliate relationships do not influence our editorial content or ratings. The presence of affiliate links does not affect our honesty or objectivity.
AffiliateDisclosure.contactDescription: If you have any questions about our affiliate practices, feel free to contact us.
